prompt: Outfit: a pale dusty-pink to powder-pink cropped V-neck cable-knit pullover in a soft cotton- or wool-blend knit, featuring narrow vertical cable patterns across the body and full-length sleeves, ribbed V-neck edging, ribbed cuffs, and a wide ribbed hem worn fully untucked, unfolded, unknotted, and resting naturally at the waist, with no front buttons or zipper, layered over a white long-sleeve button-front shirt whose main placket remains concealed beneath the sweater with the exact button state left unspecified, featuring a large pointed collar spread neatly outside the V neckline and white cuffs extending visibly several centimeters beyond the sweater sleeves with their hidden cuff fastening left unspecified, plus a medium-gray subtle plaid necktie tied beneath the collar with a compact centered knot and one broad long blade hanging freely over the front of the sweater without being tucked or loosened, paired with a heather-gray high-waisted pleated mini skirt in structured wool-like woven fabric, featuring a wide smooth waistband and broad box or knife pleats falling freely without being tucked, lifted, or folded, with the hidden skirt closure left unspecified, secured by a fixed narrow black leather-like belt threaded horizontally through the skirt’s belt loops and fastened at the exact center front with a rounded rectangular silver-tone buckle, plus a small gold-tone teddy-bear-shaped brooch pinned securely and forward-facing against one upper-chest side of the pink sweater rather than worn on the body, sheer black thigh-high stockings pulled smoothly to the mid-to-upper thighs with wide opaque top bands worn flat without folding, rolling, or slouching, generated black leather-like platform Mary Jane loafers with rounded toes, slim instep straps fastened with small silver-tone buckles, moderate chunky soles, and clean rubber outsoles, and a partially visible small structured black leather-like handbag with a narrow short handle looped around one wrist so the bag hangs downward beside the hip, with its obscured body construction and closure left unspecified, no hat, no additional jewelry, premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable knit and skirt weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible seams, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, detailed garment realism, realistic layered depth, believable tie-knot and belt tension, natural cuff overlap, believable object contact, secure brooch and buckle placement, not costume-like, not cheap-looking.

promptZh: 服装：一件 淡灰粉色至粉扑色 短款 V 领麻花针织套头衫，采用柔软的棉质或羊毛混纺针织面料，衣身和长袖上带有细长的垂直麻花纹理，V 领、袖口和宽下摆均采用罗纹设计，下摆自然垂落于腰间，未塞入、未折叠、未打结，无前扣或拉链。内搭一件白色长袖衬衫，门襟隐藏在毛衣下，扣合状态未指定，大尖领整齐地平铺在 V 领外，白色袖口明显露出毛衣袖口几厘米，袖口扣合状态未指定。搭配一条中灰色细格纹领带，系在领口下方，领结紧凑居中，宽大的长领带片自然垂在毛衣前，未塞入也未松开。下装为一条 石楠灰 高腰百褶迷你裙，采用挺括的仿羊毛织物，配有宽大的平整腰头和宽箱褶或刀褶，自然垂落，未塞入、未提起或折叠，裙子隐藏式扣合状态未指定。腰间系有一条固定的窄款黑色仿皮腰带，穿过裙子的腰带环，在正前方中心处用圆角长方形银色扣环扣紧。毛衣上胸部一侧别着一枚精致的金色泰迪熊胸针，朝向正面。穿着黑色半透明大腿袜，平整地拉至大腿中上部，宽大的不透明袜口平整，无折叠、卷边或松垮。搭配黑色仿皮玛丽珍厚底乐福鞋，圆头设计，细脚背带配有小巧的银色扣环，鞋底厚实适中，橡胶外底干净。手腕上挂着一个部分可见的小型结构感黑色仿皮手提包，包身垂在臀部一侧，包体结构和扣合方式未指定。无帽子，无其他首饰。高级面料质感，逼真的服装结构，缝线整洁，接缝张力自然，针织和裙摆重量感真实，细微褶皱，垂坠感逼真，边缘处理精致，缝线可见，褶皱真实，服装细节做工精良，材质触感高品质，服装细节写实，层次感真实，领带结和腰带张力自然，袖口重叠自然，物体接触感真实，胸针和扣环位置稳固，非演出服质感，无廉价感。
